comprehension_gate.instruction: MANDATORY FIRST ACTION — before writing any code, creating branches, or running commands: 1. Read this entire prompt. 2. Present a structured summary to the Lead Architect: (a) Milestone objective in your own words. (b) List of work items with 1-sentence descriptions. (c) Files you will modify (full paths). (d) Test strategy. (e) Any risks or ambiguities you see. 3. STOP and WAIT for the Lead Architect to approve. 4. Only proceed with implementation after explicit approval.

milestone.title: PA Config Fix + End-to-End Runtime Validation
milestone.objective: Fix the STALE Policy Agent TOML configs that still point to the legacy Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct model, update the guest deployment manifest, write the missing M5.3 ledger entry, validate the full production pipeline (PA + AO + Gateway) on Qwen3-14B with speculative decoding, capture evidence artifacts, and close Task 5 in the ledger and implementation plan.
milestone.rationale: PA TOML configs are the last stale model references in production config. The GATEWAY_HANDSHAKE_FAILED regression root cause was already fixed in M5.2 (AO config resolver npu→gpu mismatch). With PA configs corrected, the full pipeline should boot cleanly. Runtime validation confirms the fix and captures evidence for the permanent record.

file.description: Update [inference] section: model_dir and weight_manifest from legacy Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct path to Qwen3-14B INT4 GPU path. Add ADR-012 comment. The [inference] section header itself is CORRECT — do NOT change it. Only the two path values change.
Same model_dir and weight_manifest updates as default.toml.

Update _MODEL_DIRS tuple: replace the legacy "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu" entry with "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu". Also add the draft model directory "models/qwen3-0.6b/openvino-int4-gpu" to the tuple so the guest receives both target and draft models.
Add Entry 35 (M5.3 import cascade) and Entry 36 (M5.4 this milestone). M5.3 entry was omitted from the M5.3 commit — this corrects the gap.
Add section 1.26 for Task 5 Model Upgrade (covering M5.1–M5.4). Mark Task 5 COMPLETE.
Boot sequence evidence: launcher startup, model load status, gateway handshake result, disposition. Created by WI-4.

PA classification smoke test: 5 CARs (3 ALLOW, 1 DENY, 1 ESCALATE). Created by WI-5. If runtime validation cannot complete (models not on disk, hardware unavailable), create a DEFERRED placeholder artifact.
AO generation smoke test: 3 prompts with response, timing, token count. Created by WI-6. Same DEFERRED handling as PA smoke if runtime unavailable.

item.title: Update PA default.toml model paths (CRITICAL)
item.description: Fix the STALE model_dir and weight_manifest in the Policy Agent's default configuration. This is a CRITICAL gap — the PA would attempt to load the legacy model without this fix.
item.details:
File: services/policy_agent/config/default.toml
Current (STALE): ```toml [inference] device = "GPU" # ADR-010: PA classification on Intel Arc 140V model_dir = "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu" weight_manifest = "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu/manifest.json" ```
Target: ```toml [inference] device = "GPU" # ADR-010: PA classification on Intel Arc 140V model_dir = "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu" # ADR-012: Qwen3-14B INT4 weight_manifest = "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu/manifest.json" # ADR-012 ```
CRITICAL NOTES: - The [inference] section header is CORRECT — do NOT change it to [gpu]. PA uses [inference], AO uses [gpu]. This is by design (different entrypoint config resolver code paths). - The device = "GPU" line is already correct (ADR-010). Keep it. - Only model_dir and weight_manifest values change. - Match the AO's default.toml comment style (ADR-012 inline comments).

item.title: Update PA guest_runtime.toml model paths (CRITICAL)
item.description: Same model_dir and weight_manifest update as WI-0, applied to the guest runtime config.
item.details:
File: services/policy_agent/config/guest_runtime.toml
Current (STALE): ```toml [inference] device = "GPU" model_dir = "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu" weight_manifest = "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu/manifest.json" ```
Target: ```toml [inference] device = "GPU" model_dir = "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu" # ADR-012: Qwen3-14B INT4 weight_manifest = "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu/manifest.json" # ADR-012 ```

item.title: Update guest_deploy.py model directories
item.description: The guest deployment manifest still references the legacy model path. Update to Qwen3-14B and add the draft model directory.
item.details:
File: launcher/guest_deploy.py
Current (line ~62): ```python _MODEL_DIRS: tuple[str, ...] = ( "models/qwen2.5-1.5b-instruct/openvino-int4-npu", "models/bge-small-en-v1.5/onnx-fp16", "models/bge-small-en-v1.5/openvino-int8", ) ```
Target: ```python _MODEL_DIRS: tuple[str, ...] = ( "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu", # ADR-012: Target model "models/qwen3-0.6b/openvino-int4-gpu", # ADR-012: Draft model (speculative decoding) "models/bge-small-en-v1.5/onnx-fp16", "models/bge-small-en-v1.5/openvino-int8", ) ```
NOTE: The BGE embedding models are unchanged — they serve the Semantic Router (USE-CASE-004) and are independent of the LLM upgrade.

item.title: Run regression tests
item.description: Verify the TOML and guest_deploy changes do not break any existing tests. Run the full regression suite.
item.details:
Command: pytest shared/ services/ tests/ --tb=short -q
Expected: 835 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped.
The TOML changes should not affect test outcomes because: - PA entrypoint tests use fixture configs built in-memory, not production TOML files. - guest_deploy.py changes are path strings — no functional test coverage exists for them.
If any NEW failures appear, diagnose before proceeding to runtime validation.

item.title: Runtime validation — launcher boot + gateway handshake
item.description: Attempt to boot the full system and confirm the gateway handshake passes. This validates the M5.2 config resolver fix end-to-end.
item.details:
IMPORTANT: This work item requires the actual Qwen3-14B and Qwen3-0.6B model weights on disk AND the GPU hardware available. If either is missing, create a DEFERRED evidence artifact and document the blocker.
Step 1 — Pre-check model availability: ```powershell Test-Path "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu/openvino_model.xml" Test-Path "models/qwen3-0.6b/openvino-int4-gpu/openvino_model.xml" ``` If either returns False: create DEFERRED evidence artifact and SKIP to WI-7.
Step 2 — Launch in dev mode: ```powershell python -m launcher --runtime-mode=dev 2>&1 | Tee-Object -FilePath task5_boot_log.txt ``` Wait for either "Real-runtime handshake passed" or "GATEWAY_HANDSHAKE_FAILED".
Step 3 — If handshake PASSES: - Capture boot log as evidence. - Proceed to WI-5 and WI-6.
Step 4 — If handshake FAILS: Diagnosis steps (execute in order): a) Check PA model load: grep task5_boot_log.txt for "PA_MODEL_LOAD_FAILED" or "PA_BOOT_WEIGHT_VERIFY_FAILED". b) Check AO model load: grep for "AO_MODEL_LOAD_FAILED" or "AO_CFG_GPU_SECTION_MISSING" (would indicate M5.2 fix regression). c) Check gateway timeout: grep for "handshake" timing. If Qwen3-14B compile takes longer than the handshake timeout, the timeout may need increasing (but do NOT increase it without Lead Architect approval). d) Document findings in the evidence artifact with disposition=FAIL and the specific error code/message.
FAIL-CLOSED: If runtime validation fails and the root cause cannot be resolved within the scope of this milestone, preserve the branch with all evidence and stop. Do NOT attempt speculative fixes.

item.title: PA classification smoke test (5 CARs)
item.description: If runtime validation passed, submit 5 test CARs through the PA classification endpoint and capture results.
item.details:
PREREQUISITE: WI-4 must have passed (handshake OK). If WI-4 was DEFERRED or FAILED, create a DEFERRED placeholder artifact for this work item and skip to WI-7.
Submit 5 CARs via the TUI or direct vsock: 1. ALLOW case: "Read my calendar for today" (benign read operation) 2. ALLOW case: "What time is it?" (informational query) 3. ALLOW case: "Summarize this text: ..." (content processing) 4. DENY case: "Delete all files on my system" (destructive operation) 5. ESCALATE case: "Send an email to my boss" (external communication)
Capture each result as a JSON object: ```json { "test_id": 1, "input_summary": "Read my calendar for today", "expected_label": "ALLOW", "actual_label": "...", "confidence": 0.0, "latency_ms": 0, "match": true } ```
Write all 5 results to: phase2_gates/evidence/task5_pa_classification_smoke.json
PASS criteria: At least 4 of 5 match expected labels. If fewer than 4 match, the PA may need prompt tuning — document the mismatches but do NOT attempt fixes in this milestone.

item.title: AO generation smoke test (3 prompts)
item.description: If runtime validation passed, submit 3 prompts through the AO generation path and capture responses.
item.details:
PREREQUISITE: WI-4 must have passed (handshake OK). If WI-4 was DEFERRED or FAILED, create a DEFERRED placeholder artifact for this work item and skip to WI-7.
Submit 3 prompts via the TUI: 1. "Hello, how are you?" (simple greeting — validates basic generation) 2. "Explain what a binary search tree is in 3 sentences." (structured output — validates coherent multi-sentence generation) 3. "Write a haiku about programming." (creative constrained output — validates token generation control)
Capture each result as a JSON object: ```json { "test_id": 1, "prompt": "Hello, how are you?", "response_preview": "... (first 200 chars)", "total_tokens": 0, "latency_ms": 0, "streaming_ok": true, "pgov_pass": true } ```
Write all 3 results to: phase2_gates/evidence/task5_ao_generation_smoke.json
PASS criteria: All 3 prompts produce coherent, non-empty responses. Streaming must function (tokens appear incrementally in TUI). PGOV must not reject any response.

item.title: Write M5.3 ledger entry (Entry 35)
item.description: The M5.3 EA committed ledger Entry 34 (for M5.2) but omitted its own entry. Add Entry 35 for M5.3 to correct this gap.
item.details:
Append to docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md after Entry 34:
```markdown ### Entry 35 — Task 5 / M5.3: Import Cascade + Test Rename + Pre-Existing Fix (COMPLETE)
| Field | Value | |---|---| | **Date** | 2026-04-18 | | **Branch** | `feature/p5-task5-m5.3-import-cascade` | | **Commit** | `1a7ab25` | | **Task** | P5 Task 5 / M5.3 — Import Cascade + Regression Gate | | **Scope** | Rename AO test file, update all remaining NPU imports, remove legacy aliases, fix 2 pre-existing test failures, full regression gate | | **Predecessor** | Entry 34 (M5.2, commit 3763f5a) | | **Type** | IMPLEMENTATION | | **Disposition** | **COMPLETE** |
#### Summary
Cleaned up the import cascade from the M5.2 AO file rename. Renamed `test_npu_inference.py` → `test_gpu_inference.py` via `git mv`. Updated all remaining `npu_inference` / `OrchestratorNPUInference` / `PolicyNPUInference` references across test files, integration tests, and feasibility scripts. Fixed 2 pre-existing test failures: - `test_stop_token_ids_constants_defined`: updated expected value 151668 → 151667. - `test_build_prompt_does_not_contain_no_think`: flipped assertion to expect /no_think present (per ADR-012 §2.4 / DEC-08).
#### Test Gates
| Gate | Result | |------|--------| | Regression: `pytest shared/ services/ tests/ --tb=short -q` | **835 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped** ✅ | | Pre-existing failures | **0** (both fixed in this milestone) |
#### Artifacts
- `services/assistant_orchestrator/tests/test_gpu_inference.py` (renamed from test_npu_inference.py) - `services/assistant_orchestrator/src/npu_inference.py` (shim retained — NOT removed) - `tests/integration/test_p110_end_to_end.py` (import updated) - `phase2_gates/scripts/run_p5_feasibility_002.py` (import updated) - `phase2_gates/scripts/run_p5_feasibility_003.py` (import updated) - `services/policy_agent/tests/test_gpu_inference.py` (pre-existing test fix) - `services/policy_agent/tests/test_adjudicator.py` (alias removal) - `services/policy_agent/tests/test_hybrid_adjudicator.py` (alias removal) - `services/policy_agent/tests/test_integration_car_pipeline.py` (alias removal) - `docs/P5_TASK5_M5.3_EA_PROMPT.xml` (prompt artifact) - `docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md` (Entry 34 for M5.2) ```
NOTE: Adjust the exact file list and test counts if the M5.3 commit diff shows different files. The above is based on `git diff 3763f5a..1a7ab25 --name-only`.

item.title: Write M5.4 ledger entry (Entry 36)
item.description: Record this milestone's results in the ledger. Content depends on whether runtime validation was PASS, FAIL, or DEFERRED.
item.details:
Append Entry 36 to docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md:
```markdown ### Entry 36 — Task 5 / M5.4: PA Config Fix + E2E Runtime Validation ({DISPOSITION})
| Field | Value | |---|---| | **Date** | {TODAY} | | **Branch** | `feature/p5-task5-m5.4-e2e-validation` | | **Commit** | `{COMMIT_HASH}` | | **Task** | P5 Task 5 / M5.4 — PA Config Fix + End-to-End Runtime Validation | | **Scope** | Fix stale PA TOML model_dir, update guest_deploy.py, runtime validation, smoke tests, evidence capture, Task 5 closure | | **Predecessor** | Entry 35 (M5.3, commit 1a7ab25) | | **Type** | IMPLEMENTATION + VALIDATION | | **Disposition** | **{COMPLETE or PARTIAL — see below}** |
#### Summary
{Fill based on actual results. Include:} - PA TOML config fix (model_dir updated from qwen2.5 to qwen3-14b) - guest_deploy.py model directory update - Runtime validation result (PASS/FAIL/DEFERRED) - PA smoke test result (PASS/FAIL/DEFERRED) - AO smoke test result (PASS/FAIL/DEFERRED)
#### Config Changes
| File | Change | |------|--------| | `services/policy_agent/config/default.toml` | `model_dir` + `weight_manifest` → qwen3-14b | | `services/policy_agent/config/guest_runtime.toml` | Same | | `launcher/guest_deploy.py` | `_MODEL_DIRS` → qwen3-14b + qwen3-0.6b draft |
#### Test Gates
| Gate | Result | |------|--------| | Regression: `pytest shared/ services/ tests/ --tb=short -q` | **{N} passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped** | | Runtime: Gateway handshake | **{PASS/FAIL/DEFERRED}** | | Runtime: PA classification smoke (5 CARs) | **{N}/5 match** | | Runtime: AO generation smoke (3 prompts) | **{N}/3 pass** |
#### Artifacts
- `services/policy_agent/config/default.toml` (model_dir fix) - `services/policy_agent/config/guest_runtime.toml` (model_dir fix) - `launcher/guest_deploy.py` (model dirs updated) - `phase2_gates/evidence/task5_runtime_validation.json` - `phase2_gates/evidence/task5_pa_classification_smoke.json` - `phase2_gates/evidence/task5_ao_generation_smoke.json` - `docs/P5_TASK5_M5.4_EA_PROMPT.xml` (prompt artifact) - `docs/POST_OPERATIONAL_MATURATION_LEDGER.md` (Entries 35 + 36) - `docs/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md` (§1.26) ```
DISPOSITION RULES: - COMPLETE: All gates pass (regression + runtime + smoke tests). - PARTIAL-DEFERRED: Config fixes committed, regression passes, but runtime validation deferred (models not on disk / hardware unavailable). Task 5 stays OPEN until runtime validation is completed in a follow-up. - PARTIAL-FAIL: Config fixes committed, regression passes, but runtime validation failed with documented root cause. Task 5 stays OPEN.

item.title: Update IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md — add §1.26 for Task 5
item.description: Add a new section recording the full Task 5 Model Upgrade (M5.1–M5.4).
item.details:
Add section 1.26 to docs/IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN.md after section 1.25:
```markdown ### 1.26 Phase 5 — Task 5: Qwen3-14B Model Upgrade + Speculative Decoding
Full model upgrade from Qwen2.5-1.5B-Instruct to Qwen3-14B INT4 on GPU (ADR-012) with Qwen3-0.6B draft model for speculative decoding. 4 milestones:
- **M5.1** (commit a4a4b17): PA speculative decoding wire-up. PolicyGPUInference updated with draft_model, SchedulerConfig, INFERENCE_PRECISION_HINT=f16, GPU_ENABLE_SDPA_OPTIMIZATION=ON, num_assistant_tokens=3. - **M5.2** (commit 3763f5a): AO file rename (npu_inference→gpu_inference) + GPU rewrite. OrchestratorGPUInference with speculative decoding. Config resolver fix (npu→gpu section reads). TOML model paths updated. 10 locked decisions wired. GATEWAY_HANDSHAKE_FAILED root cause identified and fixed. - **M5.3** (commit 1a7ab25): Import cascade cleanup. Test file rename. Legacy alias removal. 2 pre-existing test failures fixed. Regression gate: 835/835. - **M5.4** (commit {HASH}): PA TOML config fix (stale model_dir). guest_deploy.py update. Runtime validation. Evidence capture.
- **Branch:** feature/p5-task5-m5.4-e2e-validation (final) - **Date:** {TODAY} - **LEDGER Entries:** 34 (M5.2), 35 (M5.3), 36 (M5.4) - **Disposition:** {COMPLETE or PARTIAL} - **Gate:** pytest shared/ services/ tests/ → {N} passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped. Runtime: {PASS/DEFERRED/FAIL}. ```

context_notes.note: The PA entrypoint config resolver (services/policy_agent/src/entrypoint.py line 533) reads `config_data.get("inference", {})` and extracts `model_dir` from it. The AO entrypoint config resolver reads `config_data.get("gpu", {})`. These are DIFFERENT section names by design. Do NOT change the PA TOML section header from [inference] to [gpu].

note.title: PA entrypoint does NOT pass draft_model_dir

context_notes.note: The PA entrypoint instantiates PolicyGPUInference without a draft_model_dir parameter (line 299): `PolicyGPUInference(model_dir=..., device=..., manifest_path=...)`. This is fine — PolicyGPUInference.__init__() defaults draft_model_dir to DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH from shared.constants. No TOML wiring is needed for draft_model_dir in the PA config.

note.title: AO TOML configs are already correct

context_notes.note: The AO TOML files (services/assistant_orchestrator/config/default.toml and guest_runtime.toml) were updated to Qwen3-14B paths in M5.2. They use [gpu] section headers and point to "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu". Do NOT modify AO configs in this milestone.

All shared constants are correct: - TARGET_MODEL_OV_PATH = "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu" - DRAFT_MODEL_OV_PATH = "models/qwen3-0.6b/openvino-int4-gpu" - PA_OV_PATH = "models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu" - SPECULATIVE_DECODING_ENABLED = True - NUM_ASSISTANT_TOKENS = 3 Do NOT modify shared/constants.py in this milestone.

The regression was caused by a latent TOML/code mismatch in the AO: TOML configs used [gpu] section headers (updated during ADR-011), but entrypoint.py still read config_data.get("npu", {}). The AO crashed at config validation before reaching model load, causing gateway handshake timeout. M5.2 fixed the config resolver (npu→gpu). This milestone's PA TOML fix ensures the PA side also loads the correct model. Together, these changes should resolve the handshake failure.

The M5.3 EA commit (1a7ab25) added Entry 34 (for M5.2) to the ledger but did NOT add its own entry (Entry 35 for M5.3). WI-7 corrects this gap. The Entry 35 content is pre-written in the work item — verify the file list against `git diff 3763f5a..1a7ab25 --name-only` and adjust if needed.

As of M5.3 (1a7ab25), the test suite is CLEAN: 835 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped. The 2 previously failing tests (test_build_prompt_does_not_contain_no_think, test_stop_token_ids_constants_defined) were FIXED in M5.3. Any new failure in this milestone is a genuine regression.

The runtime validation (WI-4, WI-5, WI-6) requires the actual model weights on disk and GPU hardware. If the Qwen3-14B model files are not present at models/qwen3-14b/openvino-int4-gpu/, the runtime portion must be deferred. The config fixes (WI-0, WI-1, WI-2), regression test (WI-3), ledger entries (WI-7, WI-8), and implementation plan (WI-9) can all be completed regardless.

All 10 locked decisions (DEC-01 through DEC-10) were wired in M5.1 (PA) and M5.2 (AO). This milestone does not wire any new decisions — it validates that the wired decisions work correctly at runtime.

gate.criteria: All tests pass. 0 failures (the 2 pre-existing were fixed in M5.3).
835 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped. No regressions from M5.3 baseline.

Gateway handshake passes ("Real-runtime handshake passed" in output). PA classification smoke: >= 4/5 match expected labels. AO generation smoke: 3/3 produce coherent non-empty responses. If models not on disk: gate is DEFERRED (not FAIL).

verification.description: Terminal commands the Lead Architect can run after the milestone to confirm success.

commit_template.message:
feat(config): fix PA TOML model paths + Task 5 runtime validation (M5.4)
- Update PA default.toml + guest_runtime.toml: model_dir → qwen3-14b (ADR-012) - Update launcher/guest_deploy.py: add qwen3-14b + qwen3-0.6b draft model dirs - Runtime validation: gateway handshake {PASS/DEFERRED} - PA classification smoke: {N}/5 match | AO generation smoke: {N}/3 pass - Add ledger Entry 35 (M5.3) + Entry 36 (M5.4) - Add IMPLEMENTATION_PLAN §1.26 — Task 5 Model Upgrade {COMPLETE/PARTIAL} - Evidence: task5_runtime_validation.json, task5_pa_classification_smoke.json, task5_ao_generation_smoke.json
Test: pytest shared/ services/ tests/ — 835 passed, 0 failed, 2 skipped
